zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Stanhope I於大約1289年出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Richard de Stanhope28歲，母親Ellota de Longvilliers17歲。他於大約1320年與Alice de Houghton在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1370年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Stanhope I于大约1289年出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Richard de Stanhope28岁，母亲Ellota de Longvilliers17岁。他于大约1320年与Alice de Houghton在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1370年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Stanhope I was born about 1289, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, his father, Richard de Stanhope, was 28 and his mother, Ellota de Longvilliers, was 17. He married Alice de Houghton about 1320, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1370, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Stanhope I est né environ 1289, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Stanhope, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ellota de Longvilliers, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Houghton environ 1320, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1370, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Stanhope I um 1289 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Stanhope 28 und seine Mutter Ellota de Longvilliers 17. Er hat um 1320 in Nottinghamshire, England Alice de Houghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1370 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope I è nato il circa 1289 nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Richard de Stanhope, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Ellota de Longvilliers, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Houghton circa 1320, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1370, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhope Iが約1289年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Richard de Stanhopeは28歳，母Ellota de Longvilliersは17歳であった。約1320年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでAlice de Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1370年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stanhope I(이)가 대략 1289년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Stanhope(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellota de Longvilliers(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Alice de Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stanhope I nasceu aproximadamente 1289, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Stanhope, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ellota de Longvilliers, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Houghton aproximadamente 1320, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1370, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Stanhope I родился около 1289 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Stanhope было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellota de Longvilliers, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Houghton около 1320 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1370 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Stanhope I nació aproximadamente 1289, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Stanhope, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ellota de Longvilliers, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alice de Houghton aproximadamente 1320, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1370, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
